title: Indian Army Agniveer Rally Recruitment Online Form 2026
post_name: Indian Army Rally Recruitment Agniveer, ARO, ZRO, Agniveer Women, Sepoy Pharma, Soldier Technical 2027 Apply Online Form 2026

fees.Agniveer in General Duty GD (Women Milit: Agniveer Army Recruitment Candidate must be a resident of the State from where the rally is going to apply for recruitment. Education Qualification : Class 10th Matric Exam Passed with Minimum 45% Marks and 33% in Each Subjects. Physical Eligibility Group I: Height : 162 CMS 1.6 KM Running : 7 Min 30 Second 10 Feet Long Jump 3 Feet High Jump More Details Read the Army Rally Notification.

fee_payment_method: Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking.
